project_type: Go AWS CDK infrastructure-as-code project for an event-driven sleep audio pipeline
build_system: go mod + cdk synth (npm-installed aws-cdk CLI)
test_framework: Go testing package with CDK assertions (github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/assertions)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test -v ./...' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'cdk synth' - must succeed without errors.
setup_instructions: go mod download && npm install -g aws-cdk (already available in sandbox)
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - allowlisted package registries available. Go 1.25.1, Node 22, npm available. No Docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal code. Conventional commits. Update ARCHITECTURE.md and Mermaid diagram after changes. Run 'go test ./...' and 'cdk synth' before pushing.
key_patterns: Single-file CDK stack in cdk-base.go with NewCdkBaseStack function. Tests in cdk-base_test.go using CDK assertions (Template_FromStack, HasResourceProperties, Match_*). L2 constructs throughout. Uses jsii.String/jsii.Bool/jsii.Number for pointers. All resources are in CdkBaseStack.
directory_structure: Flat structure - all Go source and tests at repo root. .agents/tasks/ for task state. .github/workflows/ci.yml for CI. .devcontainer/ for dev environment.
